quotes: Set in Agenda (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Full lockup copy: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Ensure exact structural, stylistic, and legal alignment for the 'YOU DESERVE MORE' campaign headline lockup.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in ALL CAPS, left-aligned, and stacked as three lines in hero placements. The letters 'D' in DESERVE and 'M' in MORE are set at approximately 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of either the brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue colorways. The full lockup must read verbatim: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.' Set in Agenda (or Nunito Sans ExtraBold email fallback).
